title: Anthony Winn
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Anthony Winn''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] penciller. He worked on the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series on the [[Star Wars: Republic: Prelude to Rebellion|''Prelude to Rebellion'']] storyline.{{Mediacat|imagecat=images by Anthony Winn}}
